calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-17-301458 In Re: Joe Louie Celano and PES-17-301459 In Re: Mary Sarbo.

Appearances: Eric Murriguez in Propria Persona.

Mr. Murriguez stated that he received an e-mail on Thursday from the Examiner regarding improper venue and that he received conflicting information from the Clerk at the Department of Public Health. The Court made reference to the code and stated that this needs to be filed in the County where the person was born or died. Mr. Murriquez provided two proposed orders for transfer.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
